negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No audited repo emits the required block_execute_spc_batch lifecycle phase in normal and state-hook block execution paths.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs logs block_execute_registry_update, block_execute_setup, block_execute_transactions, block_execute_consensus_verification, and block_execute_finalization in both execute paths, but there is no block_execute_spc_batch phase record.
ritual-reth-internal-v2.2.0-port/crates/ritual-metrics/src/block.rs provides log_payload_phase helpers but not the missing phase call.

notes: Confirmed by exact searches for the phase label across the port and nodebuilder.
rationale: The diff instruments both execute_one paths around SPC verification, strategy setup, transaction loop, block verifier, and finalization with the same log_payload_phase helper. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Block execution must emit block lifecycle phase records for SPC batch verification, executor setup, transaction processing, consensus verification, and post-execution finalization in both normal and state-hook execution paths.
suggested_falsification_tests: Execute a block through both execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook and assert block lifecycle logs include block_execute_spc_batch, block_execute_setup, block_execute_transactions, block_execute_consensus_verification, and block_execute_finalization with valid timing fields.
summary: Block execution phase logging is missing the required SPC batch phase record.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Execute blocks through execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook and assert lifecycle logs include block_execute_spc_batch; current code emits registry_update/setup/transactions/consensus/finalization but no SPC batch phase.
title: Block execution emits phase timings
